title: Hawke's Bay 0.1m Aerial Photos (2023)
description: Orthophotography within the Hawke's Bay region captured in the 2023 flying season, published as a record of the Cyclone Gabrielle event.

providers.name: Toitū Te Whenua Land Information New Zealand

capture_area.title: Capture area
